message:
fix(scripts): improve transcript processing input format handling and redaction accuracy

process-transcript.ts:
- Add support for JSON array input format in addition to JSONL
- The extract-transcript.ts script outputs a JSON array, but process-transcript.ts
  only accepted JSONL format, causing pipeline failures when used together
- Now tries parsing as JSON array first (checking for [ ] delimiters), then
  falls back to line-by-line JSONL parsing if that fails
- This makes the transcript processing pipeline more robust and flexible

redact-transcript.ts:
- Require Bearer tokens to be at least 20 characters to avoid false positives
  on short strings that happen to match the pattern (e.g., "Bearer token")
- Fix Windows user paths pattern to handle JSON-escaped backslashes (C:\\\\Users)
  which is the common format when paths appear in JSON files
- Rename the rule label to clarify it handles the escaped format

These changes improve the reliability of the transcript processing pipeline
used for the "how it was made" feature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
